refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall optimize and control the load→travel→dump cycle to meet or exceed the customer-defined cycle time target under specified duty cycle and site conditions.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; refining it into a control and optimization function clarifies the system's role in achieving the cycle time KPI by managing the cycle phases effectively.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure the 95th percentile cycle time (load→travel→dump) during representative duty cycles and site conditions, comparing against the CT_target.
sub_frs: FR1: Optimize load phase duration to minimize time without compromising load quality.
FR2: Optimize travel phase duration considering route and vehicle dynamics.
FR3: Optimize dump phase duration ensuring safe and efficient material unloading.
FR4: Coordinate transitions between load, travel, and dump phases to minimize delays.

candidate_dps: DP1: Adaptive cycle time control algorithm with real-time monitoring and adjustment.
DP2: Predefined fixed cycle time scheduling based on historical data.
DP3: Operator-driven cycle time management with manual overrides.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Adaptive cycle time control algorithm with real-time monitoring and adjustment.

potential_sources: Real-time data dependencies between load, travel, and dump phases.
Interaction with safety constraints and teleoperation inputs.
coupling_check.notes: The adaptive control algorithm logically decouples cycle phases but requires integration with safety and teleoperation modules, which is manageable with clear interface definitions.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate real-time telemetry data.
Risk of increased complexity leading to integration challenges.
Assumes safety constraints can be integrated without compromising cycle time.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Monitor integration complexity and consider fallback to simpler DP if adaptive control proves too complex or risky.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Implements the adaptive cycle time control algorithm managing load, travel, and dump phases.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives real-time vehicle and environment data for cycle time optimization.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends commands to Vehicle module to execute optimized cycle phases.

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Exchanges safety status and alerts with Safety Services to ensure safe operation.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Communicates with Teleoperation module for remote control and monitoring.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as the DP is core to NGHE Solution; low diffusion as interfaces are well defined.
Vehicle executes commands but does not contain control logic; higher diffusion risk if control logic is embedded here.
Teleoperation is for remote control, not cycle time optimization; embedding DP here would increase diffusion.
Safety Services focus on safety alerts; cycle time control logic does not belong here.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: The adaptive cycle time control algorithm is best contained within the NGHE Solution module to centralize logic and minimize diffusion.
containment_risks: Potential complexity in NGHE Solution module may increase integration effort.
Interface dependencies with Safety Services and Teleoperation require robust interface management.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Ensure clear interface contracts and modular design within NGHE Solution to manage complexity and integration risks.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP (adaptive control algorithm) logically satisfies the refined FR and addresses the cycle time KPI with manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Minimal diffusion risk as DP is contained within NGHE Solution module.
Interfaces with other modules are well defined and limited.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support NGHE Solution as the best ownership candidate.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification via telemetry data and cycle time measurements is feasible with current interfaces.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of DP to NGHE Solution module with defined interfaces ensures clarity.

recommended_revisions: Monitor integration complexity within NGHE Solution module.
Validate interface robustness with Safety Services and Teleoperation early in development.

decision.justification: The functional decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment meet criteria with acceptable risks and clear verification paths. No immediate need to revise or zigzag.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Optimize load phase duration to minimize time without compromising load quality.
FR2: Optimize travel phase duration considering route and vehicle dynamics.
FR3: Optimize dump phase duration ensuring safe and efficient material unloading.
FR4: Coordinate transitions between load, travel, and dump phases to minimize delays.

revise.why: Current level is consistent and complete; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: Real-time telemetry data is accurate and timely.
Safety constraints can be integrated without compromising cycle time.
open_risks: Integration complexity within NGHE Solution module.
Potential unforeseen interactions with Safety Services and Teleoperation.
evidence_needed: Performance data from prototype adaptive control algorithm.
Interface validation tests with Safety Services and Teleoperation modules.
Cycle time measurements under representative duty cycles.
